text:
Treatments for the disease are most often continued at the time of conception and during pregnancy for this purpose.
The only surgery that impairs fertility is coloproctectomy with ileo-anal anastomosis by laparotomy, but this is rare and the laparoscopic approach used for several years has changed its impact on fertility.

premature birth and spontaneous miscarriages.

TREATMENTS AT THE TIME OF CONCEPTION AND DURING PREGNANCY

MAINTENANCE / POSSIBLE USE AT CONCEPTION

MAINTENANCE / POSSIBLE USE DURING PREGNANCY

MESALAZINE

yes

yes, dose <3 g/

SULFASALAZINE

yes, supplement with folic acid

yes, supplement with folic acid

CORTICOSTEROIDS yes yes
THIOPURINES yes yes
Azathioprine / 6Mercaptopurine
METHOTREXATE no. conception possible 24 hours after
the last dose in women,
at least 3 months after the last
dose in men

ANTI-TNF
Infliximab, Adalimumab
Golimumab* Certolizumab*

yes

yes, stopping treatment can be
discussed on a case-by-case basis

VEDOLIZUMAB

yes

the indication to continue treatment should
be discussed on a case-by-case basis due to
limited scientific data

USTEKINUMAB
